name: cheapest-discriminating-test
triggers: Multiple live explanations are named in the task: hypotheses, could be either A or B, one of several candidates, possible causes or explanations
Two or more hypotheses are live and tests are not free
A proposed test's every outcome is compatible with every live hypothesis
The draft proposes diligence gestures (add more logging, increase coverage, monitor the situation, gather more data) instead of discriminators
counterindications: Only one live hypothesis exists; generate alternative mechanisms first
All tests are near-free; running everything is cheaper than designing the table
